# Task 260 observability load fixture traceability

- `docs/design/DESIGN-014.md`: `MetricsCollector` and `LogAggregator` bounded telemetry verification.
- `docs/design/DESIGN-009.md`: administration, audit, import, and external-data workflows exercised by the load gate.
- `docs/requirements/01_SOFT_REQ_SPEC.md`: SW-REQ-043, SW-REQ-054 through SW-REQ-057, SW-REQ-073, SW-REQ-084, and SW-REQ-090.
- `task260_load.json`: deterministic worker/iteration counts and adversarial privacy canaries for query text, names, emails, identities, idempotency keys, URLs, payloads, secrets, snapshots, and audit causes.
